extension.summary: No scrolling. No deciding. Just watching.
extension.description: Tired of scrolling through your library wondering what to watch? EasyTV handles it. It tracks your shows and always knows your next episode. When you're ready for something new, it'll suggest a show you haven't started. Throw in some movies if you want. Just sit down, press play, and enjoy. Built for Kodi 21+.
extension.news: v1.5.7 (2026-06-29) - Watched and Both playlist modes now correctly include partially-watched shows and skip empty ones - Finished shows are removed from your next-episode list promptly, instead of lingering until the next library scan - Multi-instance sync no longer clears the next episode for a show you still have unwatched - The "you missed an earlier episode" warning now actually pauses playback while it is shown
